Put this card in play. When a vampire successfully takes an action directed at you, that vampire takes 1 unpreventable damage (after resolving the action). Any vampire may burn this card (and take no damage from it) as a Ⓓ action. A Methuselah may have only one Travelers Obey the Tenets.

rulings.text: The acting player decides the order of (and can play other) "after resolving the action" effects. [ANK 20180206]

name: Travelers Obey the Tenets

card_text:
[dem] [ACTION] Unlock an ally or younger vampire.
[obe] [ACTION] As [dem] above, with +1 stealth.
[OBE] [REACTION] Cancel a card as it is played by another Methuselah that would be put on a vampire with Dementation [dem] they do not control. Usable even if there is no action.

rulings.text: [OBE][REACTION]Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

[OBE][REACTION]If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

[OBE][REACTION]The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
[OBE][REACTION]If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]
[OBE]If an action is canceled, it is not performed and the minion is free to attempt the same action again. [RBK cancel-a-card]
[OBE]Can only cancel minion cards played from the hand in the normal fashion (eg. can't cancel allies played via {Piper}). [RTR 20001020]
[OBE]Can be used to cancel all action cards, including employ retainer, recruit ally and political action. [ANK 20200813-2]
[OBE][REACTION]Cancelation must be immediate: a wake can be used in the "as played" window, but a reaction to "unlock and attempt to block" cannot. [LSJ 20021011]
[OBE][REACTION]Can be used if there is no action, but that allowance does not extend to other reactions (eg. wake effects). [PIB 20120808]
[OBE][REACTION]Cannot be played during combat. [LSJ 20080618]

When played, a multi-Disciplines card counts as requiring the Discipline(s) being used. In the hand, library, or ash heap, the card is considered to require any and/or all Disciplines listed on it. [LSJ 20011204-3] [PIB 20130704]

card_text:
+1 stealth action. Unique. Requires a titled Sabbat vampire.

Sabbat V5.precon: Path of Power and the Inner Voice

rulings.text: Can be used for intercept even if the vampire is already unlocked. [PIB 20150216]
If the action lacks a suitable target because of the unlock (e.g. {Ambush}), the block attempt still happens, as does the resulting combat if the block is successful. [LSJ 20090514]
Can be used by a vampire who is already attempting to block. [ANK 20181122-2]
Cannot be used if the vampire cannot attempt to block the action (eg. {Daring the Dawn}). [LSJ 20010714-2]
Does not ignore the normal prey, predator or target restrictions. [ANK 20180623]

card_text:
+1 stealth action. Requires an infernal vampire. Unique.
[dai] Put this card in play. This card can attempt to block an action directed at you (or a card you control) and is considered a 9-capacity infernal vampire with +2 intercept during that attempt; if successful, the acting minion takes 1 unpreventable environmental aggravated damage and this card is burned.
[DAI] As above, and unlock this vampire.

rulings.text: If the action is blocked, no other effect can be used (e.g. {Crypt's Sons}, {Change of Target}) before burning Unleash Hell's Fury and inflicting aggravated damage. However, effects that trigger at the same moment (e.g. {Mirror Walk}) are still applied and ordered by the acting Methuselah. Other effects and modifiers can be played after (e.g. {Change of Target}). [ANK 20210627] [ANK 20211207] [ANK 20220116]
If the block is successful, the aggravated damage is inflicted and the card burned even if the action is ended (e.g. {Mirror Walk}) before block resolution. [LSJ 20100301] [ANK 20220116]
If {The Kiss of Ra} or {Elder Impersonation} are used, the block does not happen. [LSJ 20100210]
Unleash Hell's Fury is not locked if {Faceless Night} was played. Also, it can attempt to block even if locked. [LSJ 20100210]

It is a Vampire with 0 blood while attempting to block.
It cannot pay blood costs to play cards (eg {Elder Intervention}).
It cannot "burn x blood to attempt to block" (eg {Tenebrous Form}).
It can block when "any vampire attempting to block burns 1 blood" (eg {Camarilla Exemplary}). [LSJ 19970707] [ANK 20230226]
Once it is attempting to block, its intercept can be affected by other cards normally (e.g. {KRCG News Radio}). [ANK 20211112-2]
Is not a minion when it burns (e.g. does not trigger {Tension in the Ranks}). [ANK 20230317]
The burn option can be used if all your infernal vampires are in torpor. [LSJ 20091203]
Is considered the same minion for every block attempt. Cards that prevent future block attempts by the same minion (e.g. {Elder Impersonation}) affect Unleash Hell's Fury normally. [LSJ 20100210]
The fact it is Unique has no bearing on the burn option. You cannot use the burn option if you meet the requirement, even if you already have a copy of the card in play. [LSJ 20100203-2]

If the action is blocked, *all* effects that would be triggered by a successful block (eg. {Banshee Ironwail}) must be applied (ordered by the acting Methuselah).  Other effects and modifiers (eg. {Crypt's Sons}, {Change of Target}) can only be used after all triggered effects have been handled. [ANK 20220116] [ANK 20211207] [ANK 20210627]
